heading: Public housing mortgages and security interests
label: 1437z–2 Public housing mortgages and security interests

L. 105–276section 1437 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective and applicable beginning upon , except as otherwise provided, with provision that Secretary may implement section before such date except to extent otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1998 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1999section 503 of Pub. L. 105–276section 1437 of this title

children.heading: General authorization
children.label: a General authorization
children.text: The Secretary may, upon such terms and conditions as the Secretary may prescribe, authorize a public housing agency to mortgage or otherwise grant a security interest in any public housing project or other property of the public housing agency.
the ability of the public housing agency to use the proceeds of the mortgage or security interest for low-income housing uses;
the ability of the public housing agency to make payments on the mortgage or security interest; and
such other criteria as the Secretary may specify.

children.heading: No Federal liability
children.label: c No Federal liability
children.text: No action taken under this section shall result in any liability to the Federal Government.
